productDisplayName: Van Heusen Woman Printed Pink Top
description: Composition Sleeveless printed pink and blue printed top made of 100% polyester, has a scooped neck, ballet wrap layer on the front with ruffled edges Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Summery, floral prints on this pretty van heusen top, perfect for off-duty ensembles, and also designed to complement a formal outfit. Pair this with form fitting denims or floor-sweeping flared palazzo pants. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
